body.title: CLOSED: Agent datacenter workspaces — Claude + Igor workspace directories
body.result: workspaces/claude + igor dirs; README; moved test logs; .gitignore updated; commit c878abd4
body.description:
Create dedicated workspace directories for Claude and Igor inside agent_datacenter for ephemeral logs, debugging artifacts, and temporary state.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/workspaces/claude/ (NEW), agent_datacenter/workspaces/igor/ (NEW), test_*.log → move to workspace, .gitignore (update)
**Design rules:** workspace files are ephemeral/throwaway (ignored by git). T-docs-live-in-code: workspace shape docstring in agent_datacenter/workspaces/README.md. No shared mutable state across machines — each instance has its own workspace.
**Scope boundary:** IN: define workspace structure, document purpose (test artifacts, debug logs, scratch memory). IN: move existing test_*.log files from repo root. OUT: task-related memory consolidation (separate ticket if needed). OUT: workspace cleanup/rotation policies (file size, age).
**Test plan:** no tests — this is structural. Acceptance: workspaces/claude and workspaces/igor directories exist with documented purpose; test_*.log files are moved; .gitignore updated to exclude workspace/.
